name: GitHub, PR Count
description: Hero number: total open PRs across your authored set plus PRs awaiting your review. Splits the count into a primary tile (everything that needs attention) and two sub-counts (yours / review-requested). Background colour shifts amber when any PR has been open more than seven days. Token required (search API needs auth).

cell_options.name: user
cell_options.label: GitHub username (blank uses the default from GitHub Core)
